ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hotel is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the hotel is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotel's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotel's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hotel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the hotel */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the hotel (1-5) */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the hotel (e.g., budget, mid-range, luxury) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Check-in time of the hotel */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Check-out time of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_seen" TEXT /* Date when the review was left */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_categories" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_amenities" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being analyzed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the hotel */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the hotel */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the notification is intended */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
